name: stackra/settings
purpose: Attribute-driven settings platform — AsSetting, SettingField, and SettingGroup discovery with hierarchy resolution, dual-write audit, and HTTP admin surface.
capabilities: SettingsService with system, tenant, user hierarchy
13 non-theme system setting classes (Auth, Mail, Storage, ...)
HTTP surface: List / Show / Update / Schema per group
when_to_use: Any package needs per-tenant / per-user configurable settings with a schema, admin UI, and audit trail.
when_not_to_use: For theme design tokens and UI-specific configuration, use the sibling stackra/theme package.
